programme.title: Crowned - ICC Women's T20 CWC Final 2024
programme.desc: Sophie Devine finally achieved her ultimate goal in cricket after 18 years as a White Fern as she led New Zealand to their first ever ICC Women’s T20 World Cup title in 2024. Relive one of cricket's most magical stories.

programme.title: ICC T20 WCWC 2026 - The Greatest Moments
programme.desc: Relive some of the greatest moments in ICC Women's T20 World Cup history. Some of the biggest names in the sport will talk us through how the women’s T20 game has evolved since its inception in 2009 and how the tournament has treated us over the years.

programme.title: ICC T20 WCWC 2026 - The Experts' View
programme.desc: The Experts’ View will bring together some of the finest minds in cricket to discuss the upcoming ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026. Our panel will dissect each team's strengths and weaknesses and who can go all the way to lift the trophy at Lord's.

programme.title: Spotlight - ICC Women's T20 CWC 2026
programme.desc: We gather some of the leading experts in the women’s game to discuss some of the individual superstars competing at this years ICC Women's T20 World Cup. Our panel consider some key themes and discuss which players are leading in the modern T20 game.

programme.title: Chasing The Dream - ICC T20 WCWC 2026
programme.desc: In January 2026, 10 nations headed to Nepal to fight for a place at the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup taking place in England in 2026. With hope and expectation, only 4 could qualify as our cameras followed some incredible stories that unfolded in Nepal.
